positions.title: Network Infrastructure Intern
description: Working on network infrastructure projects including IP addressing, VLAN configuration, DHCP/DNS management, and network device administration within a professional IT environment.

positions.title: Networks & Web Development Intern (Re-appointed)
description: Executed the migration of faculty computing systems by configuring and deploying secure Linux-based environments (Ubuntu).
Collaborated with senior engineers using system administration tools such as Sophos, Webmin, phpMyAdmin, and PostgreSQL for server and database management.

positions.title: Networks & Web Development Intern
description: Developed and deployed two WordPress-based applications for faculty libraries, including a custom PHP plugin to streamline staff authentication.
Maintained enterprise-level server infrastructure, including network cabling and hardware configuration.
Supported troubleshooting of servers and hardware components to verify system functionality and readiness.
